message:
🐛 Fix card kebab menu positioning — anchor to button on click and scroll (#1149)

The kebab menu position was calculated asynchronously in a useEffect,
causing layout shifts between click and render to displace the menu
~400px from the button. Fix by calculating position synchronously in
the click handler and adding scroll/resize listeners to keep the menu
anchored while open.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
